name: fix-jekyll-seo-tag-missing-dependency
description: Fix LoadError for jekyll-seo-tag gem not in Gemfile even though referenced in _config.yml
error: LoadError: Cannot load such file -- jekyll-seo-tag
solution: Add gem "jekyll-seo-tag", "~> 2.8" to the Gemfile (was in _config.yml but not Gemfile)
when_to_use:
When jekyll build fails with LoadError for jekyll-seo-tag,
or gem not found errors for plugins listed in _config.yml
